rationale: Abstract X is more rigorous and better calibrated, explicitly framing the incomplete miR1 rescue as evidence of a narrow therapeutic window, while also presenting results with greater specificity and precision throughout.
loser_weakness: Abstract Y most lacked certainty calibration — its conclusion overclaimed causality without adequately integrating the incomplete rescue finding, and its results section used imprecise language ('showcased', 'as opposed to') that reduced scientific rigor.
